label: 🇺🇸 United States
detail:
Levers: Dollar/SWIFT, military forward-deployment, chip export controls, LNG exports, alliance network.
Constraints: Polarization, fiscal deficit, alliance-management costs, reduced domestic industrial capacity.
Current posture: Bilateral deal-making approach; military reinforcement near Iran; rotational forces in the Philippines.

label: 🇨🇳 China
detail:
Levers: Manufacturing monopoly, rare earths, BRI debt, domestic market, navy.
Costs: Demographic cliff, property crisis, youth unemployment, Malacca dependency, tech sanctions.
Current posture: Drone tech advances, soft power push, Philippines talks, Cambodia base leverage.

label: 🇷🇺 Russia
detail:
Levers: Nuclear arsenal, energy exports, grain, casualty tolerance, proxy networks.
Costs: Demographic loss, brain drain, equipment depletion, China dependency.
Current posture: Informed of Iran-US talks content, junior partner dynamics increasing.

label: 🇮🇳 India
detail:
Multi-alignment strategy. 1.4B market as leverage. Swing voter in US-China competition.
Playing both sides on energy (Russian oil) and tech (US partnerships).

label: 🇸🇦 Saudi/Gulf
detail:
Post-oil diversification. Security guarantee shopping. OPEC+ pricing power.
Nuclear hedging option. Normalization leverage.

label: 🇹🇷 Turkey
detail:
NATO member controlling Bosphorus. Drone exports proven. Refugee leverage over EU.
Overextended across multiple theaters. Lira crisis ongoing.

label: 🇪🇺 EU
detail:
Strategic autonomy stated, cheap energy revealed preference. Regulatory superpower.
27-member consensus paralysis. Defense spending still anemic. Post-Russia energy trauma.

label: 🇮🇷 Iran
detail:
Nuclear negotiations via Oman. Economy heavily declining. Signaling sovereignty.
Military commander warns of regional war if attacked. China/Russia informed of US talks.

label: 🇯🇵 Japan
detail:
PM Takaichi LDP supermajority — 316/465 seats. Equities at record highs.
Platform: tax cuts and increased military spending stated as a response to China. Most security-forward Japanese platform in decades.

label: 🇰🇭 Cambodia
detail:
Chinese-built Ream Naval Base now hosting USS Cincinnati. Hedging between US and China.
Was Beijing's ASEAN proxy since 2012. Now drifting.

label: 🇵🇭 Philippines
detail:
US Army quiet rotation established Jul 2025. Task Force Philippines. EDCA bases expanding.
First China-Philippines talks in over a year — South China Sea thaw?

label: South China Sea
detail:
Contested by China, Philippines, Vietnam, Malaysia, Brunei, Indonesia.
US freedom-of-navigation operations. Chinese coast guard incidents documented.
Major shipping lane for global trade.

label: Taiwan Strait
detail:
Black Hawk drones: new frontier in US-China rivalry.
Autonomous U-Hawk can deliver HIMARS pods or Navy strike missiles.
300+ F-35s in Asia-Pacific by 2030.

label: Middle East
detail:
Iran-US indirect talks in Oman. Trump's 'beautiful armada' near Iran.
Hamas rejects disarmament. Israel expanding West Bank settler access.
Gaza body returns ongoing.

label: Ukraine Theater
detail:
Ukraine's Gripen jets likely to come with Meteor missiles.
Frozen conflict dynamics. European defense spending pressure.

label: SE Asia
detail:
Thailand: Bhumjaithai party won decisively; establishment-aligned conservative result.
Cambodia repositioning relative to China. Myanmar scam-center enforcement by China.

label: Semiconductor War
detail:
US export controls on ASML, chip equipment. China SMIC pushing domestic fabs.
$660B Big Tech AI spending spree. Chokepoint technology.

label: Energy Markets
detail:
Oil pricing dynamics. Russia-China below-market pricing.
Iran sanctions impact. OPEC+ spare capacity as lever. LNG geopolitics.

label: AI / Tech Race
detail:
$660B Big Tech AI spending spree. Kevin Warsh (likely Fed nominee) claims AI boom enables rate cuts.
Economists reject this. Anthropic breakout moment. China drone tech advances.

label: ASEAN
detail:
Central convener for SE Asia. Code of Conduct progress historically slowed; Cambodia's alignment with China cited as one factor.
Recent Cambodia repositioning may change consensus dynamics.

label: NATO
detail:
Turkey as complex member. European defense spending pressure.
US commitment questioned under transactional administration.

label: OPEC+
detail:
Saudi-led pricing. Russia member. Spare capacity as geopolitical lever.
Oil demand peak timeline creates urgency.

label: NPT / Nuclear Order
detail:
Iran invoking NPT rights for enrichment. Saudi nuclear hedging.
Non-proliferation regime under strain from multiple directions.

label: JP Election Landslide
detail: LDP wins 316/465 seats. Takaichi supermajority. Stocks soar to record. Tax cuts + defense spending to counter China. VALIDATED: NHK, FT, AJ.

label: USS Cincinnati @ Ream
detail: First US warship visit to the Chinese-built Cambodian port. Beijing publicly objected. Cambodia maintaining ties with both sides. VALIDATED: Defense News.

label: US Army Philippines Rotation
detail: ~50 troops rotational presence since Jul 2025. Task Force Philippines. 'Quiet' but persistent. VALIDATED: Defense News, USARPAC.

label: Iran-US Oman Talks
detail: Indirect nuclear talks via Oman. Witkoff + Kushner met Iranian envoys. China & Russia informed. Iran signals sovereignty. VALIDATED: Al Jazeera.

label: Jimmy Lai 20yr Sentence
detail: Hong Kong media mogul sentenced under national security law. Most severe punishment. Signaling to dissidents. VALIDATED: Reuters, FT.

label: $660B AI Spending Spree
detail: Big Tech unprecedented AI investment. Warsh claims enables rate cuts (economists reject). Tech supremacy competition. VALIDATED: FT.

label: China-PH Talks Resume
detail: First China-Philippines talks in over a year. South China Sea thaw? PH rejects declaring CN ambassador persona non grata. VALIDATED: SCMP.

label: CN Drone Tech Advance
detail: Aerodynamic tail nozzle for drones tested — 'edge over F-35s' claim. CK-300 drone. Plus US autonomous Black Hawk (U-Hawk) counter. VALIDATED: SCMP, SCMP Military.

label: Israel West Bank Expansion
detail: Security cabinet approves easier settler land purchases + more enforcement powers over Palestinians. VALIDATED: Reuters.

label: Ethiopia-Eritrea Tension
detail: Ethiopia demands Eritrea 'immediately withdraw' troops. Eritrea supporting rebel fighters. Horn of Africa instability. VALIDATED: Al Jazeera.

label: CN Myanmar Executions
detail: China executed Myanmese crime syndicate kingpins who ran scam centers trapping Chinese nationals. Regional power projection signal. VALIDATED: SCMP.

label: Singapore F-35s 2026
detail: Singapore receiving first F-35 fighters this year. 300+ F-35s in Asia-Pacific by 2030. Alliance hardening signal. VALIDATED: Defense News, Lockheed.

label: Ukraine Gripen + Meteor
detail: Ukraine's Gripen jets likely to come with long-reach Meteor missiles. Escalation capability. VALIDATED: Defense News.

label: Venezuela Releases
detail: Opposition politicians Guanipa, Superlano, lawyer Rocha freed from jail. Maduro regime signaling to US? Deal-making posture. VALIDATED: Reuters, AJ.

label: Norway China Threat Report
detail: Norwegian intelligence labels China a threat. Chinese embassy slams as 'sheer speculation'. Nordic countries aligning with US framing. VALIDATED: SCMP.

label: Epstein Network Fallout
detail: Norway ambassador resigns. UK PM aide quits over Mandelson-Epstein links. DP World boss emailed Epstein. Elite network exposure. VALIDATED: Reuters, FT, AJ.

label: Thailand Conservative Win
detail: Bhumjaithai Party won decisively. Establishment-aligned conservative parties consolidated; progressive and populist parties lost seats. VALIDATED: Reuters, AJ.

label: CN Soft Power Meme Push
detail: 'Very Chinese time' — Western social media trends painting Chineseness positively. Observers question if Beijing benefits. VALIDATED: SCMP.

label: Canada Subs-for-Auto Deal
detail: Carney tied a submarine procurement to auto-sector investment commitments. Reciprocal commercial-defense package between allies. VALIDATED: FT.

label: Iran Military Warning
detail: Gen. Mousavi: 'entire region engulfed if Iran attacked'. Iran has 'power for long-term war with US'. Deterrence signaling. VALIDATED: Al Jazeera.

label: 🛢️ Crude Oil
detail: WTI ~$95.5/bbl, +66% YTD; Brent ~$97. Risk premium from the Hormuz situation reflected in pricing. SOURCE: FMP via Bigdata, Jun 2 2026.

label: 🥇 Gold
detail: Gold ~$4,490/oz, +33% 1Y. Sustained safe-haven and inflation-hedge bid concurrent with equity strength. SOURCE: FMP via Bigdata, Jun 2 2026.

label: 🥈 Silver
detail: Silver ~$74.7/oz, +116% over the year. Year-over-year price growth outpaced gold. SOURCE: FMP via Bigdata, Jun 2 2026.

label: 📉 VIX
detail: Volatility index ~15.8 — market-implied near-term volatility low concurrent with two active conflicts. SOURCE: FMP via Bigdata, Jun 2 2026.

label: 💹 Korea/Taiwan AI Boom
detail: KOSPI +226% 1Y, Taiwan +120%, Nikkei +83%. AI-semiconductor demand cycle: equity gains concentrated geographically in Korea, Taiwan, and Japan. SOURCE: FMP via Bigdata, Jun 2 2026.

label: 📈 S&P 500
detail: S&P 500 ~7,610, +11% YTD, +27% 1Y — record highs concurrent with the Venezuela and Iran conflicts. Gains concentrated in technology and momentum sectors. SOURCE: FMP via Bigdata, Jun 2 2026.

label: ⚖️ Top 1% Wealth Share
detail: Top 1% hold a record 31.7% of US wealth (~$55T, comparable to the bottom 90% combined); bottom 50% ~2.6%. The richest 1% own ~half of all equities — equity appreciation accrues disproportionately to that cohort. SOURCE: Fed DFA / Inequality.org, Q3 2025.

label: 🇻🇪 Maduro Captured
detail: Jan 3 2026: US special forces captured Maduro in Caracas; Delcy Rodríguez sworn in as acting president; US oil sanctions lifted and privatization initiated. Government change in Venezuela accompanied by a bilateral energy arrangement. SOURCE: Congress.gov CRS, Brookings.

label: 🇮🇷 US-Israel Strike Iran
detail: Feb 28 2026: US+Israel large-scale strikes begin the 2026 Iran war; Supreme Leader Khamenei killed, son named successor; Iran closes the Strait of Hormuz. SOURCE: UK House of Commons Library.

label: 🇮🇷 Hormuz Ceasefire MOU
detail: Late May 2026: tentative US-Iran MOU to reopen Hormuz plus a 60-day nuclear window; Trump has not signed off; ceasefire violations reported (Kuwait missile strike). SOURCE: CNN, PBS.

label: 🤝 Trump-Xi Summit
detail: May 2026: Trump state visit to China; both sides frame a 'constructive relationship of strategic stability' — a managed truce, with rare earths still China's lever. SOURCE: Global Times, China Briefing.

label: 💾 Chip Ban Eased then Re-tightened
detail: May 2026: H200/MI308 cleared for ~10 Chinese firms (75k cap); Beijing then blocked imports to favor domestic silicon. May 31: new US controls added on Blackwell/Rubin/MI350X. Restricted-technology threshold raised. SOURCE: BuiltIn, GuruFocus.

label: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Victory-Day Truce
detail: May 9-11 2026: Trump-brokered 3-day ceasefire plus prisoner swap; Putin says the war may be 'coming to an end' and offers direct talks; broader settlement stalled. SOURCE: Al Jazeera, NPR.

label: 🇸🇬 Shangri-La: US Softens
detail: May 29-31 2026: post-summit, Hegseth downplays Taiwan; sharp Japan-China friction over remilitarization; broad acceptance of higher defense spending. SOURCE: Global Times, CNBC.

label: 🌊 SCS Flashpoints Persist
detail: May 2026: Iroquois Reef research-vessel standoff and Scarborough Shoal drills; Philippines (2026 ASEAN chair) calls it a 'long-term struggle'; Code of Conduct seen unachievable. SOURCE: SCMP, CNBC.

label: 🗂️ Epstein Files Released
detail: Jan 30 2026: DOJ releases 3M+ pages under EFTA (200k+ withheld); Clintons held in contempt then testify; Andrew arrested Feb 18; Commerce Sec Lutnick scheduled to testify. Primary-source document set covering associated network. SOURCE: DOJ, Britannica, CBS.

label: 📊 Markets Shrug Off Wars
detail: Equities at record highs concurrent with two regime-change conflicts; US wealth concentration also at a record. Market performance and median-household financial conditions diverging. SOURCE: FMP via Bigdata, Fed DFA.
